rawAssistant: The Skyglass Spire is a test of wills, a proving ground for those who would wield the fury of the storm. I do not 'hold' it, as if it were a burden to be borne. Rather, I command it – with every fibre of my being, every fibre that remains after...the cost of my conviction. The spire is a reflection of myself: unyielding, unwavering in its ferocity. Those who can master the relic storm within its walls will be granted strength beyond their wildest dreams – or shattered by the very tempest they sought to command.
